movesList.name: Shield Smash
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, Dn, TD, To

movesList.name: Reverse Kick
movesList.input: tap Aw, To, push Y or Z

movesList.name: Death Blade
movesList.input: hold B or C, To, TD, Dn, To

movesList.name: Leg Breaker
movesList.input: Dn, TD, To, push B or C

movesList.name: Back Blade Strike
movesList.input: hold B or C, To, Aw, AD, Dn, TD

movesList.name: Aura Strike
movesList.input: Aw, Dn, AD, Aw, push Y or Z

movesList.name: Shield Spike
movesList.input: tap Aw, To + B or C

movesList.name: Back Hand Blast
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, Aw, AU, To

movesList.name: Ram Toss
movesList.input: hold B or C, To, TU, Up, Aw
